name: Summer Sway
overview: Jane is a dancer with outstanding talents but is always taken away of her spotlight. After failing an audition she had been anticipating and with a complicated heart, she leaves for Bangkok where her friend Ji Woo is. These two came to meet with two men at a pub they frequent, and Jane who was filled with sexual encounters, also begins an unconventional and risky relationship with them. Following their instincts, these people spend their time getting into each other... Two men and a woman with eyes set on both of them.

trailers.title: ENG SUB MULTI [Clip] My Best Friend Doesn't Know How Much I Want Her to be My GL Love! | Summer Sway
